# Annotation Attributes

## Text Attributes

| Language | Background | Rotate |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| English | White | Normal |
| Chinese | Single-Colored | Horizontal |
| EN-CH-Mixed | Multi-Colored | Rotate 90° |
| | | Rotate 270° |

## Table Attributes

| Language | Frame Type | Special Issues |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| English | Full Frame | With Merge Cell |
| Chinese | Omission Line | With Formula |
| EN-CH-Mixed | Three Line | Vertical Rotate |
| | No Frame | Colorful Background |

Key-Value Pairs:
PDF Type :: Text Book
Layout Type :: Single Column
Language :: English
Fuzzy Scan :: False
Watermark :: False
